title: マチカネフクキタルからの提案

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've been gathering members, and the team is
really starting to take shape. One day...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I received a message from the great Shiraoki!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was told to pray for our team's peace and
prosperity!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
In other words, we should put up a calligraphy
piece with a motivational message!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After making her sudden declaration,
Matikanefukukitaru dashes out of my office just
as suddenly.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
In other words, you should take this suggestion
for our team name!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The name is: "Sunny Runners"! How does that
sound? You should really, really consider it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That might be a good team name! I'll have to
make note of it.
